Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOREPRESENTANTES', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &AutNiv) if &AutNiv < 1 RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOTELEVENDAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) EndiF LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &TCon057_StatusUnico.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) &PedBlq = nullvalue(&PedBlq) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Pedido Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Previsão Decrescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Previsão Crescente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Emitido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Previsão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Faturado') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Bruto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Líquido ') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Lcto') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 7 EndIF Do 'GetComboSts' EndEvent Event Refresh &OldPedCliCod = &PedCliCod &TrocarTelevendas = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('TELEVENDATROCARVENDEDOR', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWPedidoTelevendasColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWPedidoTelevendasColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf PedCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &gridPedCliCodRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &NovoStatus.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &NovoStatusFinanceiro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible PedDtaPrv.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &AuxEst.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PedVlrBrt.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon058_DigitandoPedido, &TCon058_DigitandoPedido) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido, &LiberaCreditoPedido) &PedVenCod.Enabled = &TrocarTelevendas if &TrocarTelevendas < 1 or &PedVenCod.IsEmpty() &PedVenCod = &Context.PesCod EndIF &NoPedVenCod = &PedVenCod RetornaQtdPedidosAbertos.call(&Context.EmpCod,&Context.FilCod, &PedVenCod,&Mensagem) txtAlerta.Caption = &Mensagem Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &NewUpdate = !'' &getCom.Clear() &getCom.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (&TCon058_DigitandoPedido = 'S' and PedStsDigBlk = true) &getCom.AddItem(1, 'Digitação OK') Endif &getCom.AddItem(2, 'Faltas Pedido') &getCom.AddItem(3, 'Ref./Ane./Cot.') If (PedSts = Status_pedido.ABERTO) &getCom.AddItem(4, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif &getCom.AddItem(5, 'Críticas Pedido') &getCom.AddItem(6, 'Copiar Pedido') &getCom.AddItem(7, 'Histórico Cliente') &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' &gridPedCliCodRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz) &NovoStatusFinanceiro = trim(PedNovStsFinNom) &AuxEst = UPPER(Substr(PedSts.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &gridPedCliCodRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If &IsAutorizado = false &NewUpdate = !'' &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" &NewUpdate.Link = VerPedido.Link(&Pgmname, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) else &NewUpdate.Link = PedidoVendas.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 'PEDIDOTELEVENDAS') &NewUpdate.TooltipText = "Editar Pedido" EndIf If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF Do Case Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(255, 132, 0) Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 200) Otherwise &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0) EndCase prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) prcStatusPedidoRGB.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsNom, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWPedidoTelevendasColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &getCom.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &getCom = 1 Do 'Do DigitacaoConcluida' Case &getCom = 2 Do 'Do FaltasPedido' Case &getCom = 3 Do 'Do RefAnexos' Case &getCom = 4 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' Case &getCom = 5 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &getCom = 6 Do 'Do CopiarPedido' Case &getCom = 7 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' EndCase &getCom = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoNewPedido' &WebSession.Set('TELEVENDAS_VENDEDOR', &PedVenCod.ToString()) PedidoVendas.Link(Trnmode.Insert, &EmpCod, &FilCod, 0, 'PEDIDOTELEVENDAS') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &PedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod,'V', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DomeusClientes' RetornaIsVendedor.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &PedVenCod, &PedIsVen, &PesVenIntExt) if &PesVenIntExt = Status_InternoExterno.INTERNO wwClienteTelevendas.Call() Else WWClienteRepresentantes.Call() EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &Pedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWPedidoTelevendas.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWPedidoTelevendas.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPedCliCodRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emitido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatus", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatusFinanceiro", '', !'Crédito', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaPrv", '', !'Previsão', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxEst", '', !'Est.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrBrt", '', !'Bruto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'Líquido ', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lcto', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWPedidoTelevendasColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedNum1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedNum2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedNum3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do DigitacaoConcluida' If PedStsDigBlk = true wpAlterarStatusDigitacao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh keep Else msg('Pedido não se encontra bloqueado para Digitação!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FaltasPedido' wpFaltaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RefAnexos' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv >= 1 // (1) Habilidado (0) nao habilidado wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh else msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') endif EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CopiarPedido' WpCopiarPedidoVenda.Link('WWPEDIDOTELEVENDAS', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' wwHistoricoCliente.Link(PedCliCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDVENCOD" &PedVenCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSCOD" &PedNovStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCOD" &PedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD" &PedNovStsFinCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoTelevendasColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDVENCOD", "", not &PedVenCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedVenCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSCOD", "", not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCOD", "", not &PedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD", "", not &PedNovStsFinCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsFinCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbStsCrd.Visible = (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') noPrompt.Visible = (&TrocarTelevendas = 0) vendedorprompt.Visible = (&TrocarTelevendas > 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &PedSts.IsValid Do 'GetComboSts' EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &PedCliCod.IsValid If &OldPedCliCod <> &PedCliCod Refresh EndIF EndEvent Sub 'GetComboSts' &SdtStatusPedido.Clear() &SdtStatusPedido = DpStatusPedido.udp(&EmpCod, &PedSts, 'P') &PedNovStsCod.Clear() &PedNovStsCod.AddItem(0,'TODOS STATUS') For &SdtStatusPedidoItm in &SdtStatusPedido &PedNovStsCod.AddItem(&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsCod,&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsNom) EndFor &SdtStatusPedido.Clear() &SdtStatusPedido = DpStatusPedido.udp(&EmpCod, &PedSts, 'C') &PedNovStsFinCod.Clear() &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(0,'TODOS STATUS') For &SdtStatusPedidoItm in &SdtStatusPedido &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsCod,&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsNom) EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
